• Download Rmd

Gibbs Sampling Implementation on Bivariate Half Normal Distribution(rho = 0.5)

Yiqiao Jin

2023年01月02日

R package

1 library(MASS)
2 library(base)
3 library(dplyr)
4 library(rstanarm)
5 library(bayesplot)
6 library(ggplot2)
7 library(purrr)
8 library(tidyr)
9 library(reshape2)
10 library(latex2exp)
11 library(cowplot)
12 library(ggpubr)
13 library(ks)

Indicator function of random vector X

1 Indicator <- function(x){
2   return(ifelse(FALSE %in% ifelse(x >= 0, TRUE, FALSE), 0, 1))
3 }

Folded Normal Sampling Funcion

1 FN_Sampling <- function(number, mu, sig){
2   sample <- abs(rnorm(number, mean = mu, sd = sqrt(sig)))
3   density <- function(x, u, s){
4     1/sqrt(2 * pi)/sqrt(s) * (exp(-(x - u)^2/(2 * s)) + exp(-(x + u)^2/(2 * s)) * Indicator(x))
5   }
6   return(list(sample,density(sample, mu, sig)))
7 }

Gibbs Sampling Function

1 Gibbs <- function(N,x_init,sig1,sig2,rho){
2   x_seq <- matrix(0, N, 2)
3   x_seq[1, ] <- x_init
4   for (i in 2:N){
5     ## x1|x2
6     x_seq2 <- x_seq[i - 1, 2]
7     x_seq[i, 1] <- FN_Sampling(1, x_seq2 * rho * sig1/sig2, sig1 * (1 - rho^2))[[1]]
8     ## x2|x1
9     x_seq1 <- x_seq[i, 1]
10     x_seq[i, 2] <- FN_Sampling(1, x_seq1 * rho * sig2/sig1, sig2 * (1 - rho^2))[[1]]
11   }
12   return(x_seq)
13 }

Input parameters

1 N <- 10000 
2 Chain_n <- 4
3 sig1 <- 1
4 sig2 <- 1
5 rho <- 0.5
6 x_initial <- list(first = 0, second = 0, third = 0, fourth = 0)
7 x_init <- x_initial[[1]] <-matrix(c(0.5, 0.5), ncol = 2)
8 x_initial[[2]] <- matrix(c(0.5, 1.5), ncol = 2)
9 x_initial[[3]] <- matrix(c(1.5, 0.5), ncol = 2)
10 x_initial[[4]] <- matrix(c(1.5, 1.5), ncol = 2)

Simulation

1 set.seed(1010)
2 sample_p1 <- sample_p2 <- 0
3 Chain_all <- list(Chain1 = 0, Chain2 = 0, Chain3 = 0, Chain4 = 0)
4 t_start <- Sys.time()
5 for(j in 1:Chain_n){
6   result = Gibbs(N,x_init,sig1,sig2,rho)
7   Chain_all[[j]] <- result
8   if(j == 1){
9     sample_p1 <- result[,1]
10     sample_p2 <- result[,2]
11   }
12   else{
13     sample_p1 <- c(sample_p1, result[,1])
14     sample_p2 <- c(sample_p2, result[,2])
15   }
16   if(j != Chain_n){
17     x_init = x_initial[[j+1]]
18   }
19 }
20 t_end <- Sys.time()
21 t_end - t_start
## Time difference of 0.638 secs

Data in array

1 dim2 <- paste0("chain:", 1:4)
2 dim3 <- paste0("theta", 1:2)
3 sample_array <- array(c(sample_p1,sample_p2),c(N,4,2),dimnames = list(NULL,dim2,dim3))
4 names(dimnames(sample_array)) <- c("Iteration", "Chain", "Parameter")

ergodic mean plot

1 ## Ergodic data
2 Chain_Para1_erg <-
3   sample_array[,,1] %>%
4   as.data.frame() %>%
5   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
6   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "Para") %>%
7   group_by(Chain) %>%
8   mutate(ergodic_mean = cumsum(Para)/seq_len(N),
9          Theta = "theta1") %>%
10   as.data.frame()
11 Chain_Para2_erg <-
12   sample_array[,,2] %>%
13   as.data.frame() %>%
14   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
15   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "Para") %>%
16   group_by(Chain) %>%
17   mutate(ergodic_mean = cumsum(Para)/seq_len(N),
18          Theta = "theta2") %>%
19   as.data.frame()
20 Chain_erg <- 
21   Chain_Para1_erg %>% 
22   rbind(Chain_Para2_erg) %>%
23   mutate(Theta_c = recode(Theta,
24                           "theta1" = "theta[1]",
25                           "theta2" = "theta[2]")
26   )
27 ## Implement ergodic mean plot
28 Chain_erg %>%
29   group_by(Chain) %>%
30   # top_n(n = -10000, wt = Iteration) %>%
31   ggplot(aes(x=Iteration, y=ergodic_mean, colour=Chain, group=Chain)) +
32   facet_grid(rows = vars(Theta_c), labeller = label_parsed) +
33   geom_line() +
34   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
35   # geom_hline(aes(yintercept = sqrt(2/pi)), linetype = 5, size = 0.3) +
36   theme(panel.grid.major =element_blank(), 
37         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
38         panel.background = element_blank(),
39         axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
40         strip.background = element_rect(
41           color = "white", fill = "white"),
42         panel.grid = element_blank(),
43         legend.key = element_rect(
44           color = "white", 
45           fill = "white"),
46         strip.text.y = element_text(size = 15,angle = 0)) +
47   theme(axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(r = 20)),
48         axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15))) +
49   theme(legend.key = element_rect(color = NA, fill = NA),
50         legend.key.size = unit(35, "pt")) +
51   theme(legend.title.align = 0.5) +
52   ylab("Ergodic Mean") +
53   scale_color_discrete(labels = c(expression(paste(theta^(0)==group("(",list(0.5,0.5),")"))),
54                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==group("(",list(0.5,1.5),")"))),
55                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==group("(",list(1.5,0.5),")"))),
56                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==group("(",list(1.5,1.5),")")))))

Traceplot

1 ## Trace data
2 Chain_Para1_tra <-
3   sample_array[,,1] %>%
4   as.data.frame() %>%
5   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
6   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "theta1") 
7 Chain_Para2_tra <-
8   sample_array[,,2] %>%
9   as.data.frame() %>%
10   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
11   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "theta2") %>%
12   select(theta2)
13 Chain_tra <- cbind(Chain_Para1_tra, Chain_Para2_tra)
14 ## Implement
15 traceplot <- function(data, top_n, cap){
16   data %>%
17     group_by(Chain) %>%
18     top_n(n = -top_n, wt = Iteration) %>%
19     ggplot(aes(x=theta1, y=theta2, color=Chain, shape=Chain, linetype=Chain)) +
20     labs(caption = cap) +
21     xlab(TeX('$theta_{1}$')) +
22     ylab(TeX('$theta_{2}$')) +
23     geom_line() + 
24     geom_point() +
25     guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = c(16, 17, 15, 3), linetype = 1:4))) +
26     scale_shape(guide = "none") +
27     scale_linetype(guide = "none")+
28     theme(panel.grid.major =element_blank(), 
29           panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
30           panel.background = element_blank(),
31           axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
32           axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, angle = 0),
33           plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0)) +
34     theme(legend.key = element_rect(color = NA, fill = NA),
35           legend.key.size = unit(35, "pt")) +
36     theme(legend.title.align = 0.5) +
37     scale_color_discrete(labels = c(expression(paste(theta^(0)==group("(",list(0.5,0.5),")"))),
38                                     expression(paste(theta^(0)==group("(",list(0.5,1.5),")"))),
39                                     expression(paste(theta^(0)==group("(",list(1.5,0.5),")"))),
40                                     expression(paste(theta^(0)==group("(",list(1.5,1.5),")"))))) 
41 }
42 tp1 <- traceplot(Chain_tra, 10, "Markov chain produced by 10 step iteration")
43 tp2 <- traceplot(Chain_tra, 100, "Markov chain produced by 100 step iteration")
44 tp3 <- traceplot(Chain_tra, 1000, "Markov chain produced by 1000 step iteration")
45 tp4 <- traceplot(Chain_tra, 10000, "Markov chain produced by 10000 step iteration")
46 ggarrange(tp1, tp2, tp3, tp4, ncol=2, nrow=2, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "top")

Eliminating the Burn-in period data(The previous 2500)

1 Elim_n <- 2500
2 Elim_sub <- c(1:Elim_n, (N + 1):(N + Elim_n), (2 * N + 1):(2 * N + Elim_n),(3 * N + 1):(3 * N + Elim_n))
3 sample_p1_elim <- sample_p1[-Elim_sub]
4 sample_p2_elim <- sample_p2[-Elim_sub]
5 dim2 <- paste0("chain:", 1:4)
6 dim3 <- c("theta[1]", "theta[2]")
7 sample_array_elim <- array(c(sample_p1_elim,sample_p2_elim),c(N-Elim_n,4,2),dimnames = list(NULL,dim2,dim3))
8 names(dimnames(sample_array_elim)) <- c("Iteration", "Chain", "Parameter")

Autocorrelation

1 color_scheme_set("green")
2 mcmc_acf(sample_array_elim, pars = c("theta[1]", "theta[2]"), lags = 20) + 
3   hline_at(0.5, linetype = 2, size = 0.15, color = "grey") + 
4   scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 20, 5), labels = seq(0, 20, 5)) +
5   theme(panel.grid.major =element_blank(), 
6           panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
7           panel.background = element_blank(),
8         strip.background.x = element_rect(fill = "white"),
9         strip.background.y = element_rect(fill = "white"),
10         axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10))) +
11   facet_grid(Chain~Parameter,labeller = label_parsed)
## Scale for x is already present.
## Adding another scale for x, which will replace the existing scale.

Effective sample size

1 ess_Vari <- function(Chain) {
2   C_N <- length(Chain)
3   V <- map_dbl(seq_len(C_N - 1),
4                function(t) {
5                  mean(diff(Chain, lag = t) ^ 2, na.rm = TRUE)
6                }
7   )
8   return(V)
9 }
10 ess <- function(Chain_all,Chain_n, para_n){
11   V = 0
12   para_all = c(0)[-1]
13   for(i in 1:Chain_n){
14     V = V + ess_Vari(Chain_all[[i]][(Elim_n+1):N,para_n])
15     para_all = c(para_all,Chain_all[[i]][(Elim_n+1):N,para_n])
16   }
17   rho <- head_while(1 - V / var(para_all), ~ . > 0)
18   (N-Elim_n)*Chain_n / (1 + sum(rho))
19 }
20 ess_para1 <- ess(Chain_all,4, 1) # the ess of 4 chains(theta1): 30000
21 ess_para2 <- ess(Chain_all,4, 2) # the ess of 4 chains(theta2): 30000
22 ess_para1 
## [1] 30000
1 ess_para2 
## [1] 30000

Compare MCMC estimates to “true” parameter values

1 sample_rbind_para <- rbind(sample_array_elim[,1,],
2                            rbind(sample_array_elim[,2,],
3                                  rbind(sample_array_elim[,3,],
4                                        sample_array_elim[,4,])))
5 rep(sqrt(2/pi), 2) # true_mean
## [1] 0.7978846 0.7978846
1 rep(sqrt(1 - 2/pi), 2) # true_sd 
## [1] 0.6028103 0.6028103
1 0.8809167 # true_rho
## [1] 0.8809167
1 apply(sample_rbind_para, 2, mean) # est_mean
##  theta[1]  theta[2] 
## 0.7953625 0.8012369
1 apply(sample_rbind_para, 2, sd) # est_sd
##  theta[1]  theta[2] 
## 0.6078925 0.6017826
1 cor(sample_rbind_para[,1], sample_rbind_para[,2]) # est_rho
## [1] 0.2318581

MCSE

1 ## theta1
2 sd(sample_rbind_para[,1])/ess_para1
## [1] 2.026308e-05
1 ## theta2
2 sd(sample_rbind_para[,2])/ess_para2
## [1] 2.005942e-05

PSRF: R^hat

1 sample_cbind_para <- cbind(sample_array_elim[,1,],
2                            cbind(sample_array_elim[,2,],
3                                  cbind(sample_array_elim[,3,],
4                                        sample_array_elim[,4,])))
5 J = 4
6 L = N-Elim_n
7 col_index <- matrix(0,length(x_init),Chain_n)
8 for(j in 1:length(x_init)){
9   col_index[j,] <- which(colnames(sample_cbind_para) == colnames(sample_rbind_para)[j])
10 }
11 for(j in 1:length(x_init)){
12   x_j_mean <- apply(sample_cbind_para, 2, mean)[col_index[j,]]
13   x_mean <- apply(sample_rbind_para, 2, mean)[j]
14   B <- L/(J-1) * sum((x_j_mean - x_mean)^2)
15   sj2 <- 1/(L-1) * apply((sample_cbind_para[,col_index[j,]] - x_j_mean)^2,2,sum)
16   W <- 1/J * sum(sj2)
17   R <- ((L-1)/L * W + 1/L * B + B/(L*J))/W
18   print(R)
19 } 
## [1] 0.9999423
## [1] 1.000091

REM

1 sum(abs(rep(sqrt(2/pi), 2) - apply(sample_rbind_para, 2, mean)))/sum(abs(rep(sqrt(2/pi), 2)))
